## Quest Name
<!-- A short, memorable name for the quest -->

## Type
- [ ] Progression (main tree)
- [ ] Side quest

## Tier
<!-- Which unlock tier does this belong to? (0=starter, 1=basic trains, 2=ships, 3=electric, 4=aircraft, 5=monorail, 6=maglev) -->

## Objectives
<!-- What does the player need to do? Be specific about quantities and conditions. -->
- 

## Rewards
<!-- What does the player get? Vehicle unlocks, cash, reputation, infrastructure access? -->
- 

## Flavor Text
<!-- Optional: a short story/lore description for the Story Book page -->

## Balance Notes
<!-- How hard should this be? How long should it take? Any dependencies on other quests? -->
